steps.title: Find what “determine” does in context
steps.content: The passage shows that he needs to “determine the time when he would ask her.” This describes the action of choosing or settling on a specific moment — not influencing, demonstrating, or measuring anything. He's making a timing decision.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice A (Choose) directly matches the required action — he must choose when to propose.

The other choices have different meanings: “influence” means to affect something, “demonstrate” means to show something, and “measure” means to quantify — none describe deciding on a timing.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
